moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Day
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon concludes today, July 12, marking the end of two weeks of intense tennis action at the All England Club.

angles.name: Finals Recap
angles.copy: And that's a wrap! Wimbledon 2026 culminates today. Who lifted the singles trophies, and what were your standout moments from the past fortnight?

angles.name: Tennis Talk
angles.copy: From Centre Court drama to surprise upsets, Wimbledon 2026 has delivered. As the final serves are played, what's your top memory?

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins its practice days today, July 12, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside, with tournament play running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: Tee off! The Open Championship practice days are officially underway at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: Birkdale Buzz
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are descending on Royal Birkdale for The 154th Open. Good luck to everyone involved as the practice rounds get going!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival closes
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival concludes today, July 12, in Birmingham, celebrating a weekend of ground-breaking UK and international music.

angles.name: Festival Wrap Up
angles.copy: The final grooves are dropping at Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival in Birmingham today. What was your favourite set from the weekend?

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Did you feel the funk in Birmingham this weekend? Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival wraps up today. Share your highlights!

moments.title: Brian May (Queen) turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May, on July 19! What's your all-time favourite Queen track featuring his iconic guitar work?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: He's a rock icon and an astrophysicist! Brian May turns 79 on Friday. Celebrate by cranking up your favourite Queen anthem!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) turns 74
moments.blurb: The Police drummer Stewart Copeland will celebrate his 74th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Drummer Dynamo
angles.copy: On July 16, we're wishing a very happy 74th birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland, drummer for The Police! What's your favourite Police song?

angles.name: Rhythmic Icon
angles.copy: The driving force behind The Police, Stewart Copeland, turns 74 this Thursday. Get ready to celebrate his birthday with some classic rock!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 80
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt will celebrate her 80th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Vocal Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday to the iconic voice of Linda Ronstadt on July 15! Which of her timeless hits is your favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating 80 years of incredible music! Linda Ronstadt's birthday is this Wednesday. What's the song that always makes you think of her?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds) turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 13, we're wishing a very happy 84th birthday to Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite track from the folk-rock legends?

angles.name: Byrds' Jingle-Jangle
angles.copy: From 'Mr. Tambourine Man' to 'Turn! Turn! Turn!', Roger McGuinn's influence is undeniable. Celebrate his 84th birthday tomorrow!

moments.title: Liz Mitchell (Boney M.) turns 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of the iconic disco group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday today, July 12.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the voice of Boney M., Liz Mitchell! Get your disco shoes on and celebrate with some 'Rasputin' or 'Daddy Cool'!

angles.name: Boney M. Vibes
angles.copy: Today, July 12, we're celebrating Liz Mitchell's 74th birthday! The lead singer of Boney M. brought us so many timeless hits. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: For many schools across the UK, this week marks the start of the long-awaited summer holidays, bringing a buzz of excitement for breaks and travel.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Freedom! For many, the summer holidays officially kick off this week. What are your plans for the next few weeks?

angles.name: Holiday Mode Activated
angles.copy: Whether you're off on an adventure or enjoying a staycation, the summer holidays are here! What's top of your summer to-do list?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival starts
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on July 15 in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, offering four days of music and culture.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Fun
angles.copy: Get ready, Scotland! The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins this Wednesday in Stornoway. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Island Sounds
angles.copy: The Outer Hebrides are calling! The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings four days of incredible music and culture starting July 15.

moments.title: Dan Reynolds (Imagine Dragons) turns 39
moments.blurb: Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds celebrates his 39th birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the powerful voice of Imagine Dragons, Dan Reynolds, on Tuesday! What's your favourite stadium anthem from the band?

angles.name: Believer Birthday
angles.copy: He's a 'Believer' and it's his birthday! Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons turns 39 tomorrow. Send him your best!

moments.title: Martha Reeves (Martha & The Vandellas) turns 85
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha & The Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 18.

angles.name: Motown Royalty
angles.copy: Dancing in the street! Motown icon Martha Reeves of Martha & The Vandellas turns 85 this Saturday. What's your favourite Vandellas hit?

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary Martha Reeves on July 18! Her voice defined an era. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Fred again.. turns 33
moments.blurb: Award-winning UK electronic artist and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Dance Music Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again.. on Friday! What's your favourite track from the UK's hottest producer?

angles.name: Producer's Birthday
angles.copy: From hit collaborations to electrifying live sets, Fred again.. turns 33 this week! Send your birthday wishes for July 19!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, takes place from July 18-19 at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready! Splendour Festival takes over Wollaton Hall this weekend, July 18-19. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Weekend Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Big weekend ahead in Nottingham as Splendour Festival brings a fantastic lineup across multiple stages, starting Saturday! Are you going?
